name: Kas.fyi
description: Kas.fyi is a user-friendly Kaspa explorer with live metrics, richlist, market stats, and real-time transaction data - perfect for exploring blocks, addresses, and on-chain activity.

name: KatScan
description: KatScan is a KRC-20 token explorer for the Kaspa ecosystem, offering real-time tracking, market analysis, and a mint heatmap for visualizing token activity.

name: Verum
description: A decentralized social network on the Kaspa, enabling direct creator support through KAS transactions for actions like following, commenting, and liking, with a fully open-source protocol and frontend.

name: Kaspay POS
description: Non-custodial point-of-sale system for accepting cryptocurrency payments directly to your wallet. Zero platform fees, one-time purchase, offline mode, and support for multiple fiat currencies.

name: KSPR Bot
description: Telegram-based wallet for Kaspa, offering seamless KRC20 token management and self-custodial storage, ideal for users seeking convenience and integration with messaging platform.

name: Ghost Wallet
description: Simple and lightweight Chrome extension wallet for Kaspa and KRC20 tokens. Backed by Crypto Galaxy. Supports minting, sending, and receiving tokens.

name: KasPortal
description: A cross-chain swap platform, enabling token exchanges across multiple blockchains with digital payment integrations for fiat-to-crypto conversions and non-custodial, fast transactions.

name: KasCasino
description: A premier crypto casino on Kaspa, offering handcrafted games like Plinko, Blackjack, and Kaspian Cross, with KAS-based betting, sports betting, and fast, transparent payments.

name: Kaspa DAO
description: The first decentralized autonomous organization on the Kaspa network, funding innovation and supporting projects that advance decentralization, transparency, and community empowerment.

name: TheCryptoSky
description: A marketplace for buying and selling goods, services, and listing jobs, all paid in Kaspa, with a secure on-chain wallet and escrow trading system for fast, low-fee transactions.

name: BLOCKS
description: A tokenized mining project on Kaspa for passive income via sustainable mining. Among top miners by petahash, it reinvests in hardware like Bitmain KS5 Pro and distributes rewards transparently.

name: Kaspa Memes
description: A neutral hub for researching, tracking, and discussing KRC-20 tokens. Focused on transparency, data, and trust.

name: Kasbun
description: Kasbun is a blog platform focused on the Kaspa cryptocurrency, offering news, insights, and updates through articles and a newsletter to engage and inform the community.

name: OnChain POS
description: A professional point-of-sale platform for retail and online businesses to accept cryptocurrency payments directly to their wallet, with real-time on-chain verification and built-in management tools.

name: Kasia Book
description: A directory of verified Kasia Messaging users on Kaspa. It lists X (Twitter) handles linked to Kaspa wallet addresses (or KNS names) for secure, scam-resistant discovery and messaging.

name: Sealver.stream
description: Kaspa block explorer with covenant support and KCC20 token launcher. Browse tokens, holders, transfers, and covenant states.

name: PPKAS
description: A KRC-20 token on Kaspa, combining a meme token with the first play-to-earn (P2E) app in Telegram, allowing users to play mobile games, collect NFTs, and earn tokens while learning about the Kaspa ecosystem.

name: Kasthletics
description: Proof of Workout platform merging fitness with Kaspa. Train with AI-verified reps via camera, earn $KAS rewards, rank up, and join challenges for real accountability and long-term discipline.

name: Kaspa Gateway
description: A desktop application for exploring Kaspa transactions, featuring a high-performance DuckDB backend, multi-language support, and data export capabilities.

name: Kaspian
description: Simple and lightweight Chrome extension wallet for Kaspa, offering seamless self-custodial storage and management of coins.

name: SeedBuster
description: Community-powered scam defense platform for the crypto community. It tracks, reports, and helps take down malicious phishing sites targeting Kaspa and other cryptos through automated detection and evidence collection.

name: Kaspa Radar
description: On-chain forensics tool for Kaspa. Trace addresses and visualize complete transaction graphs with interactive network views, wallet scores, flows, volume, and classifications.

name: DEX.cc Wallet
description: A non-custodial wallet by DEX.cc Lab, offering multi-account management, built-in bridge, integration with AMM swaps, and more.

name: K Notes
description: Community-focused independent review platform for Kaspa ecosystem projects, publishing transparent, criteria-based evaluations to highlight risks, quality, intent, and transparency without endorsements, promotions, or price forecasts.

name: KRCBOT
description: KRCBOT features a Kaspa TPS visualizer comparing it to leading blockchains, with links and status for resources, API docs, and Kaspa ecosystem collaboration.

name: GhoadFi
description: Bridging innovative tokenization with real-world investments (RWA) to empower communities and drive lasting impact, with a focus on Kaspa mining and investment.

name: Kaspa Scope
description: A comprehensive platform for Kaspa cryptocurrency, offering real-time market data, utility tools, block explorer, and informative blogs to educate and engage enthusiasts with in-depth content.

name: Kloak Node
description: Non-custodial payjoin coordinator for the Kloak Payment Protocol on Kaspa. Provides a privacy-enhanced fungibility layer by coordinating collaborative transactions that obscure payment links through shared inputs and randomized outputs.

name: HumPool
description: A cryptocurrency mining pool supporting Kaspa, offering automatic settlements twice daily with a minimum payout threshold, low fees, real-time income monitoring, and high-security features.

name: Kaspa News
description: A comprehensive real-time dashboard aggregating the latest Kaspa news, trending YouTube videos, top tweets, GitHub development activity, Discord updates, and AI-generated sentiment reports all in one place.

name: Token Depot
description: Platform for utility and entitlement tokens on Kaspa. Provides the OMA Wallet supporting KAS, KRC-20 tokens, and Issue-Mode CA tokens with offers, swaps, analyzer tools, and coupon functionality.

name: KasMap
description: KasMap is an interactive tool that provides a visual representation of Kaspa network nodes on a global map, allowing users to see the geographical distribution of the network.

name: Kaspa Market
description: The first decentralized marketplace for Kaspa, enabling trustless, wallet-to-wallet swaps of KRC-20 tokens, KRC-721 NFTs, and KNS Domains.

name: KasMixer
description: Secure, private mixing service for Kaspa cryptocurrency with minimal fees, enhancing transaction privacy through advanced mixing techniques.

name: Kaspa Tipbot
description: Non-custodial Layer-1 tipping bot for r/Kaspa on Reddit. Users tip directly on-chain using simple comment commands, with leaderboards and personal stats.

name: Knot Meme
description: A platform for launching KRC20 tokens on the Kaspa network, providing instant liquidity and live trading features for seamless token creation and DeFi integration.

name: Kaspa Life
description: A platform empowering users to create impactful Kaspa social media content, offering high-quality logos, color palettes, real-time data, key information, and a community leaderboard to boost engagement.

name: KaspaWave
description: KaspaWave is a community platform for Kaspa cryptocurrency, offering tools to track wallets, monitor KRC20 tokens, and stay updated with the latest news and discussions in the Kaspa ecosystem.

name: Burno
description: Community-driven platform for Kaspa’s ecosystem, covering KRC-20 tokens, projects, wallets, news, and insights with curated posts for traders and enthusiasts.

name: Kaspa Payload Decoder
description: A tool for decoding Kaspa transaction payloads, allowing users to input a Transaction ID to fetch and decode UTF-8 payloads, view transaction summaries, and access raw JSON data.

name: Kasunder
description: Kaspa's first on-chain visual analytics tool, offering dazzling visual representations of on-chain data to help users understand and navigate the Kaspa blockchain.

name: Kaspool
description: A mining pool for the Kaspa network, enabling miners to pool their resources for increased mining efficiency and regular KAS rewards.

name: Omni.kas
description: A Web3 travel platform enabling Kaspa crypto payments for flights, hotels, and tours, with $OKAS rewards, NFT-based loyalty perks, and global travel network integration.

name: KasGPT
description: An AI-powered tool for Kaspa, providing chatbots, market analysis, and smart contract assistance to enhance user engagement and adoption.

name: KasNodes
description: KasNodes tracks Kaspa network nodes, providing performance metrics and geographic distribution data to monitor network health and decentralization for researchers and node operators.

name: Kaspa 10 BPS 3D Visualizer
description: A 3D visualizer for the Kaspa blockDAG network operating at 10 blocks per second, providing an interactive and dynamic representation of real-time block creation and network activity.

name: Kaspaspeed
description: Kaspaspeed visualizes block speeds of blockchain networks, comparing Kaspa’s high block rate (10 BPS) with Bitcoin, Solana, and others. It highlights Kaspa’s blockDAG performance for PoW vs. PoS research.

name: KSPR DEX
description: A decentralized exchange and launchpad on Kaspa's Kasplex L2, enabling zero-fee token deployment, V3 AMM liquidity with perpetual creator fees, and in-channel Telegram trading for seamless DeFi access.

name: SeaSwap
description: A DEX aggregator for the Kaspa ecosystem, built on Igra Labs and Kasplex, enabling seamless trade routing and optimized DeFi trading experiences.

name: Moonbound
description: A platform for launching, trading, and earning on the Kaspa network, providing tools for creators to build sustainable DeFi and tokenization projects.

name: Fervent Finance
description: The first lending and borrowing platform in the Kaspa ecosystem, built by Zealous Swap, offering capital-efficient, non-custodial DeFi with insured deposits and audited contracts.

name: Gemlaunch
description: A token launchpad on Kaspa, enabling no-code fair launches with gamified features, AI assistance, community-driven economics, and automatic DEX graduation for token growth and sustainability.

name: Zenith
description: Fair-launch token launchpad on Kaspa L2 (Igra Network). Create memecoins instantly with bonding curves - no pre-sales, no admin keys, no creator allocation.

name: Tokify
description: No-code platform for Web3 builders to simplify token creation and management. Enables instant token deployment with features like minting/burning/pausing support, and customizable vesting schedules.

name: ProBit Global
description: ProBit Global is a Seychelles-based trading platform founded in 2018, focused on global altcoin trading with KYC for higher limits.

name: Ask & Bid
description: Ask&Bid is a privacy-focused Tier-1 exchange aggregator launched in 2026, offering no-KYC anonymous swaps backed by a Dispute Guarantee Fund to protect users' capital.

name: WhiteBIT
description: WhiteBIT is a Lithuania-based trading platform founded in 2018, EU regulated with high trading volume, focusing on security, liquidity and speed.
